nodes.name: Petroica
nodes.summary: Petroica（Petroica）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Tomtit、北岛鸲鹟、South Island robin等14种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mountain robin
nodes.summary: Mountain robin（Petroica bivittata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mountain robin。

nodes.name: Mountain robin
nodes.summary: The mountain robin (Petroica bivittata), also known as subalpine robin, alpine robin or cloud-forest robin, is a species of bird in the family Petroicidae. It is found sparsely throughout the New Guinea Highlands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and subalpine shrubland. The robin eats insects, caught in flight. Two subspecies have been noted, Petroica bivittata bivittata and Petroica bivittata caudata. References
